flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Merced College rose 20% between 2007 and 2010 ($548 → $658).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Merced College fell 16% between 2009 and 2010 (5.1% → 4.3%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Merced College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Merced College fell 13% between 2007 and 2010 (16.6% → 14.4%).
